name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, regulatory compliance changes cause missed deadlines and potential penalties. We provide a compliance dashboard instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in staying updated with regulatory compliance changes.
